# backend/data_pipeline/__init__.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:13Z

## Purpose
Data Pipeline module · comprehensive Data-tab structure per process.

Per operator brief 2026-06-09: Data tab must surface for each process:
  · data types inventory (structured/unstructured/semi-structured)
  · AS-IS visualization
  · EDA (feature evaluation · feature selection)
  · balance/imbalance + SMOTE + normalization + standardization
  · score · remove missing · remove special chars
  · image data: noise check + correction · before/after viz
  · pipeline approach: Input · Process · Output per row
  · other formats (audio/video): conversion to text/image then above

Layout rules:
  · one row = one task
  · info card vs action card (clearly labeled)
  · journey flow horizontal · flowchart · IPO · status one-liner

Per §57.7: library probe per row · scaffold flag when not installed ·
NEVER fabricate results.
